name: Robust and reproducible ferroptosis research
description: The 2025 field recommendation on compounds, genetic models, evidence combinations and common experimental pitfalls.
caution: A consensus guide, not primary evidence for a specific biological claim.

name: PubMed ferroptosis search
description: Peer-reviewed papers, publication types, corrections and linked metadata from the US National Library of Medicine.
caution: Indexing and publication dates may lag; search results are not quality-ranked.

name: Europe PMC ferroptosis search
description: Literature search with full-text links, citation context, preprints and data connections.
caution: Includes multiple publication statuses; verify the version of record.

name: bioRxiv ferroptosis search
description: Early research signals before peer review, useful for methods, negative results and emerging mechanisms.
caution: Preprints are provisional and must not be presented as peer-reviewed evidence.

name: ClinicalTrials.gov ferroptosis search
description: Registered interventional and observational studies that mention ferroptosis.
caution: A registered biomarker study does not prove ferroptosis occurs in patients or mediates treatment response.

name: DFG SPP 2306 Ferroptosis Network
description: Projects, investigators, publications, meetings and training across the German ferroptosis priority programme.
caution: Network news highlights member output and is not an independent evidence assessment.

name: FerrDb V2
description: Manually curated ferroptosis regulators, substances and disease associations with literature links.
caution: Useful for discovery, but gene labels and disease associations must be checked against the original paper and update date.

name: KEGG Ferroptosis pathway
description: A compact reference map connecting iron handling, glutathione, lipid metabolism and canonical perturbagens.
caution: A pathway map compresses context-dependent and disputed relationships; it is a navigator, not a causal model.

name: LIPID MAPS
description: Lipid structures, identifiers, nomenclature, spectra and analytical resources for ferroptosis lipid chemistry.
caution: Database identity does not establish that a lipid was measured or causal in a specific study.

name: BODIPY 581/591 C11 reagent guide
description: Official reagent properties, excitation/emission shift, handling and catalog information for the C11 lipid-oxidation sensor.
caution: Vendor documentation explains the reagent; it is not an independent validation of biological specificity.

name: Crossref Metadata Search
description: Check DOI metadata, versions, publication dates and linked corrections before recording a paper.
caution: Metadata may contain publisher errors; compare with the journal version and Crossmark when available.

name: RCSB PDB: GPX4 structures
description: Search experimentally deposited GPX4 structures and linked validation reports.
caution: A deposited structure supports a defined construct and condition, not every cellular conformation.
